phoneticUs: 藢忙kt蓹藢no蕣藞ma瑟藢si藧t; 藢忙kt蓹藢no蕣ma瑟藞si藧t
examples: A highly unsaturated antibiotic acid obtained from an actinomycete.
The total salt is the greatest negative interaction factor to quantity of actinomycete.
An antibiotic that is derived from an actinomycete; used in treating infections of the urinary tract.
